goal: Use the Web Agents extension to discover, authenticate, bind, and execute roundtable turns in the user's normal Chrome without exporting provider credentials.
non_goals: Do not automate login, CAPTCHA, human verification, or credential entry.
Do not return or persist cookies, access tokens, bearer values, complete session responses, account identity, or provider request headers.
Do not remove the dedicated CDP and fake-provider fallback paths.
Do not accept a URL as proof of authentication.
acceptance_criteria: Normal Chrome provider tabs can be opened or focused from the web page through the installed extension.
ChatGPT, DeepSeek, and Doubao login state is reduced to a boolean inside the provider origin and combined with composer readiness.
The web page automatically discovers and binds authenticated ready tabs without pasted URLs.
The existing server scheduler can execute extension-backed turns through an in-memory loopback relay.
Bridge, login, verification, composer, and response timeout failures use the existing recovery workflow.
Extension tests, typecheck, build, focused server tests, and the full local runtime suite pass.
